reviews.review_title: I love the app but...now it's fixed
reviews.review_description:
As promised the app is now working wonderfully although I only get to see proxy version but that's okay it's not crashing anymore.
I can only hope that meta isn't going to break it again.
Ever since version 76 it has stopped working. 
I still do get the error message, "too low memory for vr.ndi for Quest".
The weird thing is sometimes it's for apps like YouTube which I had not opened up or used at all.
Thanks so much guys for stepping in and taking care of this for me. I use it everyday and I love it there's a few things I'd like to see. 
Like the 3D VR 180 completely blocks out my view it'd be nice if there was a window for my keyboard so that I could easily hit play and pause while watching.

I'm able to get uncompressed NDI streams working, but anytime I try to connect to an NDI HX stream i get a black screen with text telling me that the decoder was not found. Is this a known issue? I think my NDI setup is working properly otherwise

developer_response.body: Unfortunately, NDI HX is not supported as it requires an NDI Advanced License which would make the app price 10x higher.

reviews.review_description: As there is no documentation for this its difficult to know if I am doing anything wrong on my end.  But using nobe.display in resolve is correctly sending out an NDI signal.  This is being seen and picked up in the quest 2 device...however the image coming through is garbled angled lines...like its not mapping or displaying it correctly.

developer_response.body: What is the resolution that you are sending? Also, be sure to use the correct projection format for your video. Documentation is available through our website, or here: https://docs.google.com/document/d/1vFI9pNKhtdONcOa6RQ1Aa9w2iIXYvvgoHLlu42WtMyk/edit?tab=t.0#heading=h.9dgc4kzd7exz

reviews.review_description: Just purchased - can get NDI feeds working without an issue but everything is stuck in 360 or 180 degree mode - there is no way to just view 2D windows , the source just disapears

developer_response.body: Sorry! This was a result of a recent patch to hopefully fix some of the out of memory errors. Version 3.1.4 is in review and corrects this regression. It should be live shortly.
